---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for StructScope
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

**What problem would this solve?**
Describe the actual gap or friction point - not just the feature itself.
(e.g. "I can't tell which structure sources contributed to a Discover
result" rather than "add a table.")

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to see happen.

**Alternatives considered**
Any other approaches you thought about.

**Additional context**
Anything else - links to relevant docs (`docs/ROADMAP_V3.md`,
`docs/ROADMAP_V4.md`, `docs/FEATURES.md`), related issues, etc.
